channel.title: Nerra Network — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from all Nerra Network podcast shows.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: NHTSA has escalated its investigation into Tesla's Full Self-Driving software to the engineering analysis phase.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: NHTSA has upgraded its investigation into how Tesla FSD handles glare and low-visibility conditions across 3.2 million vehicles.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX launched the Terafab project to build vertically integrated AI chip production on a massive scale.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Canada is investing $200 million in its own Spaceport Nova Scotia to cut reliance on SpaceX for future launches.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Elon Musk confirms Tesla's Terafab AI chip plant starts production in just seven days.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's latest software update brings Comfort Braking to Model Y, enhancing smoother stops for owners.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla gains a stake in SpaceX by converting its $2B xAI investment, deepening ties between Musk's companies.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla is ramping up Cybercab production to hundreds weekly at its Austin factory ahead of launch.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla ramps up Cybercab testing on public roads as it queues for mass production.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla loses two long-time executives, including finance VP Sendil Palani after 17 years and OTA director Thomas Dmytryk after 11 years.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's FSD tech is now called more revolutionary than the iPhone by experts, sparking major buzz.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla patents breakthrough dry electrode process for cheaper, cleaner battery production.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's patent for a one-piece composite seat signals the next-gen Roadster is nearing its debut.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's Giga Berlin workers elect 'Giga United' majority, signaling a shift away from union influence.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Automakers are exiting Tesla's EU carbon credit pool, which could squeeze a key revenue stream worth billions.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla raised the Cybertruck's entry price to $69,990 just 10 days after its $59,990 launch, signaling strong initial demand.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla raised the Cybertruck AWD price by $10K to $69,990 after strong initial demand.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's FSD (Supervised) fleet hits 8.4 billion cumulative miles, closing in on the 10 billion needed for unsupervised autonomy.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla confirms upgraded black headliner and 16-inch screen for new Model Y orders in Canada, enhancing customer appeal.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's new affordable Cybertruck variant sees delivery estimates pushed to April 2027 amid surging demand.
Giant craters on metallic asteroid Psyche could finally confirm if it's the exposed core of a destroyed protoplanet.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Researchers are investigating how Mars gravity will change astronauts' skeletal muscle.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: ESA will charter its own dedicated SpaceX Crew Dragon flight to the ISS to expand astronaut flight opportunities.
The vernal equinox arrives today at 10:46 A.M. EDT, marking astronomical spring as the Sun crosses directly over Earth’s equator.
Blue Origin has filed plans for a massive constellation of up to 51,600 satellites to host data centers in orbit.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA confirms readiness for Artemis 2, targeting a crewed lunar orbit no earlier than April 1.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Scientists traced the most energetic neutrino ever detected to blazars powered by supermassive black holes.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA's DART mission successfully altered an asteroid's solar orbit, proving deflection potential for planetary defense.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: A new study proposes space weather scrambles alien radio signals, evading SETI detectors.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: China's new economic plan elevates space as a pillar industry with deep space goals.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: A total lunar eclipse tonight will turn the full moon blood red, visible to over 3 billion people.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Engineered probiotic bacteria infiltrated tumors in mice and produced cancer drugs on site, potentially improving precision while cutting side effects.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA has overhauled its Artemis program, canceling the Artemis 3 moon landing and adding a preparatory mission in 2027.
South African raptors have declined sharply over 16 years, with half the studied species dropping more than 50%.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA shakes up human spaceflight leadership after critical Starliner report.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Ravens in Yellowstone navigate directly to likely wolf kill sites using memorized landscape patterns rather than following the predators.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Scientists uncovered evidence of ancient underground water on Mars that may have sustained microbial life longer than expected.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Researchers found that combining two colon polyp types raises bowel cancer risk up to fivefold.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: European trial finds sulthiame drug cuts sleep apnea breathing pauses by up to 47%, improving oxygen levels.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Mayo Clinic identified a rare MET gene mutation directly causing fatty liver disease without common risk factors.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Phase 1 trial uses base editing to safely lower LDL cholesterol in familial hypercholesterolemia patients.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: A massive cellular atlas of 7 million cells shows aging begins earlier and coordinates across 21 organs.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Infusing stem cells from young donors reduced frailty in older people, boosting their strength and mobility.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Shingles vaccine may slow biological aging and reduce inflammation.
Escalating Iran conflict triggers global energy crisis warnings, market turmoil, and emergency government meetings.
Trump considers winding down Iran war while easing sanctions on Iranian oil as Israel strikes Tehran targets and global energy prices surge.
Fair zero-determinant strategies break in the periodic prisoner's dilemma, unlike the classic repeated version.
Google open-sourced an MCP server for Colab, letting any local AI agent directly use cloud GPUs and Jupyter runtimes.
TrustFlow introduces topic-aware vector reputation for multi-agent systems, replacing scalar scores with queryable multi-dimensional vectors.
